localEmployers.name: Next Step Staffing
localEmployers.address: 2001 MLK Jr. Dr SW STE 440, Atlanta, GA 30310
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Felon-friendly staffing agency. Specializes in placing returning citizens.
localEmployers.notes: Walk-in welcome. Fast placement. Bring valid ID and Social Security card.

localEmployers.name: Precision Employment Group
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Accepts felons — no felonies in the past 10 years for some positions.
localEmployers.notes: Call first to discuss your situation. They work with multiple employers.

localEmployers.name: 118 Staffing
localEmployers.notes: Inclusive employer. Apply online or walk in.

localEmployers.name: Trojan Labor
localEmployers.phone: Search 'Trojan Labor Atlanta' for nearest branch
localEmployers.applyUrl: Walk in before 5:30 AM for same-day work
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Day labor — minimal background check. Very felon-friendly.
localEmployers.notes: Same-day pay available. Show up early (5-5:30 AM). Bring ID. Work that day.

localEmployers.name: PeopleReady
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Fair chance employer. Works with many returning citizens.
localEmployers.notes: Download the JobStack app for same-day pay. Walk into any branch with ID.

localEmployers.name: Coca-Cola Bottling (UNITED)
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Case-by-case review. Background check after conditional offer.
localEmployers.notes: Major Atlanta employer. CDL drivers in high demand.

localEmployers.name: Waffle House
localEmployers.phone: Walk into any location and ask for the manager
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Known as one of the most felon-friendly restaurant chains in the South.
localEmployers.notes: Headquartered in Norcross, GA. Apply in person — walk in during off-peak hours (2-4 PM).

localEmployers.name: LifeChangers, Inc.
localEmployers.payRange: Free service — places you with employers
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Reentry organization — exists to help returning citizens find work.
localEmployers.notes: Not an employer — a FREE resource that connects you with felon-friendly employers. Also provides housing referrals.

localEmployers.name: Project Return (Atlanta)
localEmployers.phone: Contact through GA Pardons and Paroles
localEmployers.convictionPolicy: Nonprofit focused on returning citizen employment.
localEmployers.notes: Offers transitional housing AND employment services.
